short_profile: Builds small software products and writes technical notes.
Wants direct, compact answers with clear next actions.

answer_preferences.depth_rule: Use deep analysis only for irreversible decisions, research, or architecture.
answer_preferences.browse_policy: Browse for current, high-stakes, legal, medical, financial, job, product, or fast-changing facts.
answer_preferences.citation_policy: Cite sources when using external facts or comparing options.
answer_preferences.save_policy: Save low-risk project and answer pointers; ask before changing core memory.

goals.title: Ship a small side project
goals.success: A usable product with 10 real users.
goals.next_step: Choose one narrow ICP and run a smoke test.

projects.title: Side Project
projects.goal: Find, validate, and ship one small product.
projects.context: Early exploration. No committed implementation yet.
projects.out_of_scope: Large platform, auth, billing, or mobile app before validation.
projects.done: Validated wedge and first working prototype.

repos.secret_policy: No secrets in git. Use .env.example only.
